Laura Di Franco shared inspirational insights and strategic tips during the event.

news.summary: A recent collaboration between Vortex Companies and EBAA Iron has brought Vortex Water closer to becoming a complete, ready-to-use watermain renewal system. This partnership, announced on June 5, 2025, marks a significant milestone for Vortex Companies, a prominent player in trenchless infrastructure solutions on a global scale. This strategic alliance with EBAA Iron, a well-known American company, signifies a step forward in the advancement of water infrastructure technology. The details of the collaboration and its potential impact on the industry are highly anticipated.
news.headline: Vortex Companies partners with EBAA Iron to advance watermain renewal system. Global leader in trenchless solutions in collaboration with renowned American company.

news.summary: Customers of Dillard's online platform now have the opportunity to purchase the cutting-edge car seats from babyark. The announcement was made on June 5, 2025, in Austin, Texas.

news.summary: The ComEd Business & Public Sector EV Rebate Program has been added to the variety of state-level incentives offered for Mullen Commercial EVs. Other existing programs include California's Hybrid and Zero-Emission Truck and Bus Voucher Incentive Project and Massachusetts Offers Rebates for Electric Vehicles program. These incentives aim to promote the adoption of electric vehicles among businesses and public sectors.
news.headline: Mullen joins ComEd rebate program, offering Illinois business customers EV incentives. Joining CA and MA programs.

news.summary: Demand for VPX power supplies shows no signs of slowing down in 2025, with bookings remaining robust. The industry has seen a sustained trend of high demand for these supplies, reflecting an ongoing requirement for reliable power solutions. The continuous growth in bookings signifies the importance of VPX power supplies, with businesses and organizations recognizing the need for efficient and dependable power sources. This positive trend underscores the steady market for VPX power supplies, indicating consistent interest and investment in this technology.
news.headline: Orbit Int'l Power Group books $1 million in May 2025; strong VPX supply bookings continue.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 05, 2025, Cannabix Technologies Inc. (CSE: BLO) (OTC PINK: BLOZF) (Frankfurt: 8CT) announced that Omega Laboratories Inc. of Ohio, USA, a renowned drug testing laboratory, has provided a Validation Packet for their Laboratory Developed Test Method. This method is specifically for testing delta9 THC analytes in relation to Cannabix's Marijuana Breath Test (MBT) technology. The validation was conducted in Omega's ISO/IEC 17025 accredited laboratory environment as per their Quality Management System standards. Omega Laboratories is known for its comprehensive drug testing services.
news.headline: Omega Labs gave validation packet to Cannabix for Marijuana Breath Test tech validation under partnership. Omega is an Ohio-based lab, known for drug testing services, with ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation.

news.headline: SELLAS expands advisory board with Drs. Philip Amrein and Alex Kentsis in hematology and oncology. Key progress expected.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the latest unemployment rate in the country stands at 4.3%, showing a decrease from the previous month. The number of unemployed individuals is now at 7.2 million, marking a significant improvement in the job market. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and indicating positive growth. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook, citing these statistics as evidence of a recovering economy. The labor force participation rate also saw a slight increase to 61.5%. Overall, these numbers reflect a positive trend in the job market and economic recovery.
news.headline: April sees a significant drop in U.S. trade deficit.

news.summary: Neysla Paltsev's latest hardcover book, "Polished In Pink: Etiquette for Life's Messy Moments," is making waves with its blend of style, storytelling, and practical advice for contemporary readers. Released in Dallas on June 5, 2025, this book is gaining popularity just in time for the upcoming travel season. With a focus on providing real-life guidance, the book offers a fresh perspective on handling challenging situations.

In her new role, Alteri will be responsible for overseeing the operations of the company, playing a crucial role in its future growth and development.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed between RockDove Solutions, the developer of the In Case of Crisis incident and crisis management platform, and The Center for Personal Protection and Safety (CPPS). news.summary: Armitron, a renowned American watchmaker marking its 50th anniversary, is introducing a new line of watches as part of their #Tide Sustainable Ocean Plastics Collection. These watches are crafted from recycled ocean-bound plastics, underscoring the brand's commitment to sustainability. This initiative aims to raise environmental awareness and promote responsible consumption practices. Armitron's new collection is a significant step towards reducing plastic waste, with a portion of the proceeds dedicated to supporting ocean conservation efforts. The company's dedication to sustainability is evident in their innovative approach, merging fashion with eco-conscious values. This move not only reflects the company's heritage but also sets a benchmark in the industry for ethical and environmentally friendly practices. Visit Armitron's website for more information about their latest sustainable collection.
news.headline: Armitron partners with Wildlife Conservation Society, launches new watches made from recycled ocean-bound plastics. #Tide Sustainable Ocean Plastics Collection. Celebrating 50 years.

news.summary: Located in Stonington, Connecticut, Veritable Distillery recently launched a new product on June 5, 2025. The company, known for producing premium historically-inspired spirits in New England, released Limoncello, an invigorating aperitif perfect for leisurely summer enjoyment. Lemons, historically highly valued in colonial New England, are highlighted in this new offering.
news.headline: Veritable Distillery introduces new Limoncello made in old world way, perfect for summer sipping. Made with prized lemons.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, TOP Ships Inc., a global company owning and operating modern, eco-friendly tanker vessels, revealed that the NYSE American (NYSE) has set an ex-distribution date for the planned spin-off of two Suezmax tanker vessels. news.headline: TOP Ships Inc. sets ex-distribution date for planned spin-off of Rubico, a new Nasdaq-listed Suezmax tanker company.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Papa John’s International, Inc. (NASDAQ: PZZA) has promoted Caroline Miller Oyler to the position of Chief Administrative Officer. Oyler, who previously held the role of Chief Legal and Risk Officer starting in 2018 and also served as Corporate Secretary, will now take on additional responsibilities. In her new capacity, she will be in charge of overseeing human resources and culture, legal affairs, risk management, safety and security, internal audit, as well as facilities. This change is effective immediately and marks a significant shift in the company’s leadership structure.
news.headline: Caroline Miller Oyler promoted to Chief Administrative Officer at Papa John's, overseeing HR, legal, etc. (CEO, 100 c)

news.summary: The National Mango Board (NMB) has launched a new campaign in partnership with Squishmallows, offering fans the opportunity to explore fresh mangos in a unique way. news.summary: Growing interest from institutions and rising hodling behavior have led to a significant decrease in the percentage of Bitcoin available on exchanges, reaching the lowest level seen since 2018. This trend suggests a potential supply crunch in the near future.
news.headline: BTC supply shock possible as institutional demand leads to lowest BTC on exchanges since 2018.

news.summary: The US Semiconductor Manufacturing Equipment market is anticipated to grow to USD 15.75 billion by 2029 from USD 12.13 billion in 2024, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.4% from 2024 to 2029. Factors driving this growth include increased investments in domestic semiconductor fabrication facilities, rising demand for high-end chips from automotive, consumer electronics, and industrial sectors, and government incentives for boosting domestic chip manufacturing capacity. Technological advancements like EUV lithography and advanced packaging are also contributing to market expansion. The US market benefits from having major semiconductor manufacturing equipment companies within its borders, leading to continuous innovation and robust supply chain resilience. Key players in this market include Applied Materials, ASML, Tokyo Electron Limited, Lam Research Corporation, KLA Corporation, SCREEN Holdings Co., Ltd., Teradyne, Advantest Corporation, Hitachi High-Tech Corporation, and Plasma-Therm. Logic semiconductors are expected to dominate the product type segment of the market.
news.headline: US Semiconductor Manufacturing Equipment market to reach $15.75 billion by 2029, up from $12.13 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 5.4%, driven by increased investment, demand for high-end chips, and advancements in fab processes. Major players include Applied Materials, ASML, Tokyo Electron, Lam Research, and more. Logic segment expected to dominate the product type segment.

news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG; TSX: BRAG) has appointed Scott Milford as the Executive Vice President, Group Content. Bragg, a prominent player in next-gen iGaming content and technology, aims to fortify its position in the US and worldwide online casino market with this move. Milford, with over 25 years of experience, will be crucial in driving Bragg's growth as a leader in developing online casino games and gamification strategies. This strategic decision reflects Bragg's dedication to maintaining its rapid expansion and innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Scott Milford appointed as EVP, Group Content at Bragg Gaming Group to drive innovation in casino game development. #Bragg #gaming
